voices.name: Grandma
voices.message: My sweet Nana, you are the light of our family. Grandma loves you more than words can say.

voices.name: Grandma
voices.message: Another special blessing from your grandma. May this year bring you everything your heart desires.

voices.name: Anydupe
voices.message: Nana! You're such a beautiful soul. Never change who you are. The world is better because you're in it.

voices.name: Big Bro Nicosh
voices.message: Nana, I'll always be here — to protect you, to annoy you, to love you. That's what big brothers do. Forever and always.

one.message: Before the world knew your name, you were already shaping ours. These snapshots are where your journey began — a beautiful soul taking her first steps into a life she'd fill with light.

photos.caption: A tiny spark that would become a whole fire.
The same smile, the same heart — just taller now.

two.title: Your People
two.subtitle: The ones who see you completely.

timeline.title: The Anchor
timeline.description: My sweet Nana, you are the greatest gift life ever gave me. Watching you grow fills my heart with pride every single day.

timeline.title: The Protector
timeline.description: I'll always be here — to protect you, to annoy you, to love you. That's what big brothers do. Forever and always.

timeline.title: The Wise One
timeline.description: My dear child, you have a light inside you that can never be dimmed. Shine bright, always. I love you.

timeline.title: The Real One
timeline.description: Nana! You're such a special soul. Never change who you are. The world is better because you're in it.

letter: Sixteen years. That's how long the world has been lucky enough to have you in it.
You are not just my little sister — you are my reminder that goodness exists, that laughter heals, and that growing up doesn't mean losing your spark.
At 16, the world opens up. New adventures, new dreams, new versions of yourself waiting to be discovered. And I promise you this: you'll never walk any of it alone.
Today, soak it in. Every smile, every voice, every moment — it's all for you.
With all the love a big brother can hold,
three.finalSurprise: One last thing… Look under your pillow. There's a little something waiting for the birthday girl.

easterEggs.message: You are so much more than enough. 🦋
